per_question.question: Velocity команды linehaul
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT sprint_name, complete_sp AS velocity, complete_issues AS completed_tasks FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%linehaul%' ORDER BY activation_date DESC LIMIT 10;

per_question.question: Sprint goal команды lpop
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT sprint_goal FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%lpop%';

per_question.question: Cancel rate команды marketplace

per_question.question: Сколько всего story points у команды cthulhu?
Сколько задач каждого типа у команды lpop?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT issue_type, COUNT(*) as count FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE feature_teams = 'lpop' GROUP BY issue_type;

per_question.question: Распределение задач по статусам у команды cthulhu
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT issue_status_act, COUNT(*) as count FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE feature_teams = 'cthulhu' GROUP BY issue_status_act ORDER BY count DESC;

per_question.question: Среднее значение done total у команды cthulhu
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT AVG(done_total) AS average_done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%cthulhu%';

per_question.question: Среднее done total команды marketplace за все спринты
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT AVG(done_total) AS average_done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams = 'marketplace';

per_question.question: Средняя velocity команды linehaul
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT AVG(complete_sp) AS average_velocity FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams ILIKE '%linehaul%';

per_question.question: Средний scope drop у команды shopping cart
Средний done total по каждой команде
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(done_total) AS average_done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY average_done_total DESC;

per_question.question: Средний scope drop по каждой команде
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT feature_teams, AVG(scope_drop) AS avg_scope_drop FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics GROUP BY feature_teams ORDER BY avg_scope_drop DESC;

per_question.question: Какой максимальный story points у одной задачи?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT MAX(storypoints_act) AS max_story_points FROM report_agile_dashboard;

per_question.question: Какой минимальный done total среди всех команд и спринтов?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT MIN(done_total) AS min_done_total FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics;

per_question.question: В каком спринте был самый большой scope drop?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT sprint_name, scope_drop FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics ORDER BY scope_drop DESC LIMIT 1;

per_question.question: Сколько задач в каждом кластере?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT cluster, COUNT(*) as task_count FROM report_agile_dashboard GROUP BY cluster ORDER BY task_count DESC;

per_question.question: Сколько задач со статусом Done в каждом кластере?
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT cluster, COUNT(*) as done_task_count FROM report_agile_dashboard WHERE issue_status_act = 'Done' GROUP BY cluster;

Суммарная velocity команды rint за все спринты
per_question.generated_sql: SELECT SUM(complete_sp) AS total_velocity FROM report_agile_dashboard_metrics WHERE feature_teams = 'rint';

per_question.question: Сколько всего SP было добавлено в спринты команды shopping cart?
